name: Peach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place peach and kiwi slices in a medium bowl.
2. Add the citrus juices (from the oranges and lemon) and sugar to taste.
3. Stir gently until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Sprinkle the fresh mint leaves on top of the fruit.
5. Chill the salad for several hours before serving.
